characters.appearance: Male in his mid-20s with a slim build and light complexion. He has short brown hair and a thin mustache. His facial features are expressive and animated.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a plain white t-shirt with a small graphic on the left chest.
characters.demeanor: Playful, willing to try, and easily laughs at his own mistakes.

characters.appearance: Female in her mid-20s with a slim build and light complexion. She has long, straight dark hair parted in the middle. Her expressions are warm and encouraging.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a black spaghetti strap top and a white smartwatch on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Supportive, amused, and confident in her abilities.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Six. यार ये pronunciation बड़ी मुश्किल है। [Six. Man, this pronunciation is really hard.]
Character B says: Sixth. Supernova पे AI tutor के साथ बोल के देखो। [Sixth. Try speaking with the AI tutor on Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: the learner's struggle with English pronunciation.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as a practical, accessible solution.
- Sets a warm, supportive tone rather than a critical one.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Hindi-medium Boyfriend. English-medium Girlfriend. Supernova App. AI Tutor. Let's start! Tap the button below and say the word. sixth. Compare my pronunciation to yours and then try recording the word again. 64%. Great improvement, let's keep going! 99%.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Jewerly.
Character B says: (Laughs) Jewelry. देख, app में red mark आया। [(Laughs) Jewelry. Look, you got a red mark in the app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights a common pronunciation mistake in a lighthearted, relatable way.
- Demonstrates the app's real-time feedback mechanism visually and verbally.
- Reinforces the comfortable, non-patronizing dynamic between the characters.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Hindi-medium Boyfriend. English-medium Girlfriend. Supernova App. AI Tutor. Let's pause to troubleshoot. Listen to the difference in our recordings and try again. jewelry. 59%. Now great changes, let's move on. 96%.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Specific.
Character B says: Specific. Wow, 92%! Supernova पे रोज़ practice काम आ रही है। [Specific. Wow, 92%! Daily practice on Supernova is working.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a moment of success and validation for the learner.
- Emphasizes the value of daily practice, a core Supernova feature.
- Shows the app's positive reinforcement and scoring system.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Hindi-medium Boyfriend. English-medium Girlfriend. Supernova App. AI Tutor. Let's begin! Record yourself saying the word below. specific. 92%. Wow! Good job! I'd say, 'Mic drop!' but you don't want to break your phone. 100%.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Foughts. No, I'm doing it wrong. मुझसे नहीं होगा। [Foughts. No, I'm doing it wrong. I can't do this.]
Character B says: Thoughtful. अरे डरो मत, AI tutor judge नहीं करता। [Thoughtful. Oh don't be scared, the AI tutor doesn't judge.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses learner frustration and the fear of making mistakes.
- Highlights Supernova's core value proposition: a safe, non-judgmental space to practice speaking.
- Encourages persistence and resilience.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Hindi-medium Boyfriend. English-medium Girlfriend. Supernova App. AI Tutor. Let's start! Tap the button below and say the word. thoughtful. 26%. Compare my pronunciation to yours and then try recording the word again. Excellent work, persistence pays off! 98%.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: The six sick sheep.
Character B says: The sixth sick sheep. Supernova के साथ तुम्हारी English पक्की हो जाएगी! [The sixth sick sheep. Your English will become solid with Supernova!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Ends on a fun, challenging note with a tongue twister.
- Delivers the final brand payoff and a confidence boost.
- Acts as a soft call-to-action for the viewer to start their own learning journey.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Hindi-medium Boyfriend. English-medium Girlfriend. Supernova App. AI Tutor. Let's start! Tap the button below and say the phrase. The sixth sick sheep. 75%. That wasn't quite right. Listen carefully to how I say it and then compare it to how you said it.
